    829.ShadowheartIllusion: Lady Shar's blessings be upon you.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParentsEPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Global
    • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParents {3a3b0ecf-a1ed-4733-8548-0348befc6bac} = True
    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet {7ca3c49e-ba45-9662-986d-aea64a47add7} = True

    Text

    Lady Shar's blessings be upon you.
    h20e0f1e8gc58dg4487gb93bg32fe1e2082fa | 69fbe2fe-a5fc-4a4b-a368-63a0c57c58be | stub
    My Lady truly shows her splendour on nights like these...
    h63a59d3cg29a5g4c2fgbc84g00006b3a2d87 | da50c417-5620-40e1-9e83-bf05c12152a1 | stub
    Almost a shame we didn't throw more parties, come to think of it. After felling Ketheric Thorm perhaps? We even had an inn at our disposal. And a brewery...
    h21d43e8ag71eeg4d48ga890g262d595f4379 | a5f10514-6db5-4abb-8757-a673493dbb66 | stub
    I'll admit it - I miss the sounds of the wilderness at night. You simply don't get that in the city.
    hcc926f71g08a8g42cag8be4g1b93e5240d5f | a7ab61f5-0c93-46da-91e3-ce23abdf7b3c | stub

    Metadata

          926.ShadowheartIllusion: Most, perhaps. But I can hardly be paying compliments to my lady's competition now, can I?

        • +
          983.ShadowheartIllusion: I couldn't agree more. Lady Shar's holy work is all-consuming - I doubt I'd manage without a feather bed to turn to.

          Metadata

                    1011.ShadowheartIllusion: A pity, yes... but also for the best, perhaps. It would have pained me to have you close, but not be able to dedicate myself to you in every waking moment.

                    Metadata

                      739.ShadowheartIllusion: We would have been able to claim just enough of each other's hearts in order for it to hurt. Better to indulge ourselves fully whenever fate allows, than to live in compromise...

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b30c8b43-429f-0090-8238-7e39e43ef07dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf9370214g578ag49begbb50gea3bfdc5a579Text UUID: a0125e23-a208-4124-8074-2e7fe4537520Group ID: fa145fc0-45cf-f551-fa24-0ac39b3a7796Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        536.ShadowheartIllusion: ... And tonight, of all nights, was made for indulgence.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85ec8ef9-dbe8-8007-583c-83a028cbfc4dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf971f295gd2d1g4571g820cg9ce0d652bfecText UUID: 4f09cbe1-cdc2-4367-9d40-d45b3292d5a7Timeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85ec8ef9-dbe8-8007-583c-83a028cbfc4dTimeline Phase Duration: 7.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1831.46s-1833.28s] | @ 1831.63s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1831.46s-1833.28s] | @ 1831.71s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1831.46s-1833.28s] | @ 1831.75s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1831.46s-1833.28s] | @ 1832.02s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1833.28s-1837.52s] | @ 1833.82s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1833.28s-1837.52s] | @ 1835.5s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

                          Flags and Tags

                          ruletagtype rule
                          • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                          Text

                          Variant 1

                          combine=0
                          • Full-Illithid
                          I've missed you. We don't see enough of each other.
                          h5ef2c0b8gf5a2g4de7ga1b2ge04c3307ff0d | 38b2ae78-b58e-40fd-8172-172866fcab5f | stub

                          Variant 2

                          I've missed you. We don't see enough of each other.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 85d7dcfe-0180-eba0-e62f-cae3b3a8bc72Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h5ef2c0b8gf5a2g4de7ga1b2ge04c3307ff0dText 1 UUID: 38b2ae78-b58e-40fd-8172-172866fcab5fText 2 Handle: h9971bee3g63aeg4e2bgbc21gb09a2d7f81d9Text 2 UUID: 6ad2b023-707e-4eaa-b4fa-663c5cbc85d0Show Once: True
                          • +
                            871.ShadowheartIllusion: I don't know if that's strictly true... I think I saw just about every inch of you, when I last slipped away from my duties...

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d7ba9881-e785-b7cc-fadf-bfd605f27d8fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hbfe36f18g4747g4185g80cfgf3f2000389bfText UUID: 44281542-5b37-4557-a9b8-79e1e887ed4eTimeline Phase Index: 239Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d7ba9881-e785-b7cc-fadf-bfd605f27d8fTimeline Phase Duration: 38.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2389.71s-2396.79s] | @ 2389.82s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2389.71s-2396.79s] | @ 2390s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2389.71s-2396.79s] | @ 2392.2s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2389.71s-2396.79s] | @ 2393.92s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2389.71s-2396.79s] | @ 2395.44s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2396.79s-2399.95s] | @ 2397.8s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2396.79s-2399.95s] | @ 2397.9s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [2396.79s-2399.95s] | @ 2398.34s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [2396.79s-2399.95s] | @ 2398.45s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2400.31s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2402.61s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2408.01s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2411.91s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2413.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2415.76s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 16: Shot 3 [2399.95s-2425.64s] | @ 2421.94s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: d7ba9881-e785-b7cc-fadf-bfd605f27d8fGroup Index: 0
                            • +
                              216.ShadowheartIllusion: I jest. You would think I'd be accustomed to loss, yet it stings all the same. Lady Shar may keep me occupied, but there is always a place in my heart and mind for you.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 35efbddd-51e2-3ef6-a539-c3f9d144e870Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hb42648c3gf7cfg450fgafe9gc27a9c292f7dText UUID: 996e6766-d574-4333-81f8-b9ee63771f04Group ID: d7ba9881-e785-b7cc-fadf-bfd605f27d8fGroup Index: 1
                              • +
                                213.ShadowheartIllusion: But let's not grow maudlin - this is a celebration. Tell me what you've been doing with yourself.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3519fe61-10a5-cf9e-99d9-1a000077f7c4Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h16cff79dgf22eg4536gb6c6gbeef799c383eText UUID: 2a84e165-e4a7-4ada-9c25-96e3ad616549Group ID: d7ba9881-e785-b7cc-fadf-bfd605f27d8fGroup Index: 2
                                • •

                        • +
                          327.Player: Perhaps being apart is what was best for both of us.Full-Illithid

                          Flags and Tags

                          Variant 2

                          Metadata

                          • +
                            192.ShadowheartIllusion: You didn't seem to be of that mind when we last slipped away together. You couldn't get enough of me, as I recall.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e0c1a69-6390-b9fa-8ecc-63167a45eb3aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h87f86a59g98b0g4020gbd6agfa447e417098Text UUID: 763d1bc4-83b2-4346-aec8-68eb832b69c8Timeline Phase Index: 208Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e0c1a69-6390-b9fa-8ecc-63167a45eb3aTimeline Phase Duration: 21.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1981.28s-1989.48s] | @ 1981.71s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1981.28s-1989.48s] | @ 1983.99s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1981.28s-1989.48s] | @ 1984.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1981.28s-1989.48s] | @ 1986.79s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1989.48s-1991.62s] | @ 1989.66s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1989.48s-1991.62s] | @ 1989.79s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1989.48s-1991.62s] | @ 1989.99s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1989.48s-1991.62s] | @ 1990.43s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1989.48s-1991.62s] | @ 1990.5s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1991.62s-2002.64s] | @ 1991.71s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1991.62s-2002.64s] | @ 1994.16s | speaker 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 1Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1991.62s-2002.64s] | @ 1998.39s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [1991.62s-2002.64s] | @ 2001.32s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 1 [2002.64s-2006.41s] | @ 2002.64s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Group ID: 2e0c1a69-6390-b9fa-8ecc-63167a45eb3aGroup Index: 0
                            • +
                              141.ShadowheartIllusion: At least let's enjoy tonight, then I can leave you be once more. In time, you will feel the old yearning again, and darken my door.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 233e8663-fbf3-54ad-7f11-b9668f378c37Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7a415d19g63c6g4cbfgb47dg134a09da783dText UUID: a351d614-a11c-44c1-bb5b-e20fd5372db0Group ID: 2e0c1a69-6390-b9fa-8ecc-63167a45eb3aGroup Index: 1
                              • +

                    488.ShadowheartIllusion: You did, and I'll be forever grateful. Perhaps one day, you may open your eyes to her wisdom yourself... but even if you do not, I shall make sure that the sharp edge of her spreading gospel does not trouble you.

                      35.ShadowheartIllusion: If those people didn't come to me, who knows where they'd end up? Lady Shar provides food, shelter, training, purpose... and the wisdom that one day, their pain will no longer matter.

                      Text

                      If those people didn't come to me, who knows where they'd end up? Lady Shar provides food, shelter, training, purpose... and the wisdom that one day, their pain will no longer matter.

                          885.Player: I've mostly been focused on establishing my domain. When you're the god of ambition, you can't be seen to do things by halves...Full-Illithid

                          Variant 1

                          combine=0
                          • Full-Illithid
                          I've mostly been focused on establishing my domain. When you're the god of ambition, you can't be seen to do things by halves...
                          hbf6b9c75g5cfag4d32g9dd0gf6a277c41b5f | 6e1159e8-0958-457c-bec2-57ec472c2029 | stub

                          Variant 2

                          I've mostly been focused on establishing my domain. When you're the god of ambition, you can't be seen to do things by halves...
                          hf0eb46dcg053bg4a12g962egde94b73ab401 | 4bc61043-1ee9-48d1-9d7c-19c04eb8dc45 | stub

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: de85b807-39c7-dba2-27f5-3011544125d8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hbf6b9c75g5cfag4d32g9dd0gf6a277c41b5fText 1 UUID: 6e1159e8-0958-457c-bec2-57ec472c2029Text 2 Handle: hf0eb46dcg053bg4a12g962egde94b73ab401Text 2 UUID: 4bc61043-1ee9-48d1-9d7c-19c04eb8dc45Show Once: True
                          • +
                            298.ShadowheartIllusion: Apart from give closure to a former lover, perhaps? Don't worry - I'm not upset. Lady Shar would likely have prised us away from each other even if you had remained.END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedShadowheart

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                            • END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedShadowheart {b123048b-07de-4b06-884e-a12b54e984e1} = True

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4b0c817b-37c1-3630-4f36-d99d71fd8377Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7aa1774dg5a42g45f5ga01cg052c5260b58eText UUID: e107f8e9-3478-4110-9ed8-0bcfed4289f6Timeline Phase Index: 352Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4b0c817b-37c1-3630-4f36-d99d71fd8377Timeline Phase Duration: 27.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0eTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0e.lsfGroup ID: 4b0c817b-37c1-3630-4f36-d99d71fd8377Group Index: 0
                            • +
                              528.ShadowheartIllusion: I can't imagine she'd be thrilled to hear I've been consorting with her competition, but between you and me... best of luck with your endeavours.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8359cdff-bda7-fc0f-3620-36ff03ab06b9Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h476753c9g16d2g46d3g8640g224c1b2966bbText UUID: 14501c37-cc36-4aef-b7c1-30a4862a72d4Group ID: 4b0c817b-37c1-3630-4f36-d99d71fd8377Group Index: 1

                          • +
                            613.ShadowheartIllusion: Well I'd wish you luck, but my lady may not appreciate me encouraging the competition.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 96ccc161-b57b-28ac-6ad7-f9da84eddbf7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h93a601a5g18ebg43aeg9c6bg0c6c6e3bf7e1Text UUID: 2675a825-d2d6-40e9-8aad-4913fb0883ebTimeline Phase Index: 236Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 96ccc161-b57b-28ac-6ad7-f9da84eddbf7Timeline Phase Duration: 14.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2341.4s-2351.14s] | @ 2341.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2341.4s-2351.14s] | @ 2343.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2341.4s-2351.14s] | @ 2345.19s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2341.4s-2351.14s] | @ 2350.45s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2351.14s-2353.6s] | @ 2352.79s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [2353.6s-2355.43s] | @ 2353.75s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [2353.6s-2355.43s] | @ 2353.87s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [2353.6s-2355.43s] | @ 2354.35s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [2353.6s-2355.43s] | @ 2354.54s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: 96ccc161-b57b-28ac-6ad7-f9da84eddbf7Group Index: 0

                          385.Player: Tell her you've been living a quiet existence, and you're very glad for it.!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Wyll!Gale!Lae'zel!Astarion+1 more

                            741.ShadowheartIllusion: I won't pretend I'm not a little jealous. Lady Shar is a demanding mistress - as is her right to be - but a little calm and solitude would be a tonic.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b37c8abd-f3bd-fd71-7da7-00d09f26a199Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hd1f52a35gce24g434dgade0gb5c721413f62Text UUID: c15075bc-6bcb-4798-b6aa-50306738c3f5Timeline Phase Index: 57Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b37c8abd-f3bd-fd71-7da7-00d09f26a199Timeline Phase Duration: 14.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 552.56s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 552.79s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 554.25s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 556.91s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 559.44s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 561.06s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 562.21s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [552.56s-565.64s] | @ 563.12s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [565.64s-567.36s] | @ 565.99s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [565.64s-567.36s] | @ 566.11s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [565.64s-567.36s] | @ 566.16s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [565.64s-567.36s] | @ 566.23s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | mimicry

                                247.ShadowheartIllusion: But don't be such a stranger either, in future. Should Withers grant you leave from Avernus, you'll know where to find me - I can always make some time for an old friend. One of the privileges of being in charge.KarlachFull-Illithid

                                      120.ShadowheartIllusion: Would that I could. But this is my life now. Lady Shar must come first - always.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1c8877aa-2088-2d7e-ff29-ebbf509b87ceSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hd8289031g467eg4aa7g8970g719b72d6b5b2Text UUID: 89906d1f-175c-4d0b-87d1-3b7949cc681fTimeline Phase Index: 218Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1c8877aa-2088-2d7e-ff29-ebbf509b87ceTimeline Phase Duration: 10.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2126.22s-2134.93s] | @ 2126.44s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2126.22s-2134.93s] | @ 2129.27s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2126.22s-2134.93s] | @ 2131.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                                      • +

                                        • +
                                          3.ShadowheartIllusion: All-consuming. Endless decisions to make, underlings jockeying for your attention, threats from the outside, threats from the inside... there's times I miss when it was just our little group against the odds.

                                          Text

                                          All-consuming. Endless decisions to make, underlings jockeying for your attention, threats from the outside, threats from the inside... there's times I miss when it was just our little group against the odds.
                                          h2ace3486ga704g4b25gb8d5ge38eda02f1ad | 9e02f00f-5ad1-4d82-ab58-75a5c10eadef | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 00a868be-e479-7b4b-f98e-ba8b3969ebf6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h2ace3486ga704g4b25gb8d5ge38eda02f1adText UUID: 9e02f00f-5ad1-4d82-ab58-75a5c10eadefTimeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 00a868be-e479-7b4b-f98e-ba8b3969ebf6Timeline Phase Duration: 27.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [314.78s-322.39s] | @ 314.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [314.78s-322.39s] | @ 317.05s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [314.78s-322.39s] | @ 318.24s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [314.78s-322.39s] | @ 319.74s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [314.78s-322.39s] | @ 321.17s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [322.39s-324.97s] | @ 324.27s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [324.97s-335.23s] | @ 325.22s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [324.97s-335.23s] | @ 327.24s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [324.97s-335.23s] | @ 329.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [335.23s-339.96s] | @ 335.55s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 4 [335.23s-339.96s] | @ 338.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 5 [339.96s-342.02s] | @ 340.25s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [339.96s-342.02s] | @ 340.39s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 5 [339.96s-342.02s] | @ 340.7s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 15: Shot 5 [339.96s-342.02s] | @ 341.02s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: 00a868be-e479-7b4b-f98e-ba8b3969ebf6Group Index: 0
                                          • •
                                            1029.ShadowheartIllusion: Simplicity is a luxury that's drifted out of my reach, I'm afraid. But at least for tonight, I can have a taste of how it used to be.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fdc855e1-7582-cbd3-059e-55458fb1b17fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h507be2f5g2905g483bg8974g104f2e7775acText UUID: 1c5c263c-5473-4397-a124-5b2291433a85Group ID: 00a868be-e479-7b4b-f98e-ba8b3969ebf6Group Index: 1
                                      • +

                                          252.ShadowheartIllusion: I shouldn't... but from time to time, yes. Holding the office she once held, standing within the shadow of Lady Shar herself... It complicates my feelings towards her.

                                          Metadata

                                          • +
                                            293.ShadowheartIllusion: I came to see her as an adversary, an obstacle, but what recourse did she have? What did she see when she looked at me?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49b47031-8f2e-07f6-e91c-1900ca95d538Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hdb7be748gbc05g4191g90bbg352120de5c47Text UUID: 3d6feb08-2385-4ada-9f5b-afde7ae26c3dGroup ID: 40d7c296-3e67-3257-db48-983414e02f40Group Index: 1
                                            • +
                                              336.ShadowheartIllusion: A future in which she was discarded, where the reward for her service and sacrifice was to groom her own replacement?

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54813501-66b6-7848-352e-af156f87dec3Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h99e527bfgd35cg48a1g96f0g2977954032b1Text UUID: a71df159-4d4f-403d-8380-e7a26ebd1977Group ID: 40d7c296-3e67-3257-db48-983414e02f40Group Index: 2
                                              • •
                                                160.ShadowheartIllusion: What transpired was the Dark Lady's will. If time rolled back, I would do the same thing all over again, without hesitation... yet I am not without sympathy.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 283f5787-94ed-f2d3-c6ee-057400ddf362Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h85eebcdfg8ee2g481fg9890ge14bf841da73Text UUID: cd20e884-3c9e-4871-ae28-07847a8c60b5Group ID: 40d7c296-3e67-3257-db48-983414e02f40Group Index: 3
                                      • +

                                        • +
                                          376.ShadowheartIllusion: Almost as busy as I am - such rapid growth creates a good deal of work for a quartermaster. So many lost souls, in need of dark cloaks... she has risen to the occasion though, as I knew she would.

                                          Text

                                          Almost as busy as I am - such rapid growth creates a good deal of work for a quartermaster. So many lost souls, in need of dark cloaks... she has risen to the occasion though, as I knew she would.
                                          hc18b1d18g5ca5g455egaeacg3f79f0d8c5ee | 7e22a78d-b8eb-40d7-bbd3-51cf7ebe92b7 | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          • +
                                            772.ShadowheartIllusion: Sometimes she fears the others will grow jealous; that I see her as a favourite - well it's true, I do.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd0ad244-65cb-5bb9-2f3a-7c8352cc4648Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hb89f7fb9g0aaag4722ga3b3gab67f9aeb36eText UUID: 58d63413-3591-4760-a2de-2a24dcc1ecbcGroup ID: 5d016eec-8d52-f979-7075-1b91663518deGroup Index: 1
                                            • •
                                              845.ShadowheartIllusion: They can challenge me on the matter if they dare... though none are so bold.

                                      • +

                                          957.ShadowheartIllusion: Very well. Just don't squeeze the breath out of me.

                                          Text

                                          Very well. Just don't squeeze the breath out of me.
                                          h6410a4cfg4d55g468agb50eg6db5fec4f80b | 6906118d-1c36-4839-a833-624ec326fa77 | stub
                                          I suppose I can't deny you, given how often I've spoken of Lady Shar's embrace...
                                          he35614b3g87c8g4955ga8b6g618b2b17d622 | b2cd50cf-29fa-4a12-a188-a582d01c541f | stub
                                          Well it'd be cruel of me to deny you...
                                          hfca32e35g1946g44bbgbb05g40526917a42e | 4822fc47-6443-47be-bd78-23fc47905916 | stub

                                              969.ShadowheartIllusion: Hmm. I think I needed that more than I realised.

                                              Text

                                              Hmm. I think I needed that more than I realised.
                                              hf7ae1803g9360g4273g8360g0a30f3963642 | 44e97a1f-e8ba-4f1c-8f81-cf703f796e8f | stub

                                              My, I think you've gotten stronger.

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        Might I trouble you for another kiss?

                                        Variant 2

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9e532a8c-176e-e002-5631-c94f120b889eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: he749d35eg1b1bg49c9g843bge4ad34cb590cText 1 UUID: fd2cbd86-a157-4745-b900-a31497f33c8aText 2 Handle: h002f205egb76ag49e7gb675g122bedee367bText 2 UUID: 81acd698-690e-4162-bf8f-a7211b172420Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          647.ShadowheartIllusion: That's the sort of trouble I live for.

                                          Text

                                          That's the sort of trouble I live for.
                                          h52748d9eg7edcg4ec7gb7f4g3420366ec3d4 | 86528e8d-8557-45cd-8726-72016e50453f | stub
                                          I suppose you may.
                                          h89c71938g378bg44a8g90bbgb6213b225789 | d2e4fbb1-823a-42b8-8c6c-5a16f32d5091 | stub
                                          You took the words right out of my mouth.
                                          h3940f64egc003g4e93g8f1bg85da6f726c7c | 358b5389-7a4b-4cdf-a701-d862dfeaa4c8 | stub
                                          Only if you leave me feeling lightheaded.
                                          h876874c9g2143g4f35ga33bg36b9fce69997 | 53997c54-4fac-473c-8f1e-f66a76b7a78c | stub

                                              886.ShadowheartIllusion: I won't forget that in a hurry - which is truly saying something, coming from me.

                                              Text

                                              I won't forget that in a hurry - which is truly saying something, coming from me.
                                              h21385077g4a55g4014gba70gf1734f64911c | cb5abe26-8bd8-4f6c-b06f-d47207a006a4 | stub
                                              Hmm. I might have to call on you to trouble me again, before the night runs its course.
                                              h803f517ag42c4g4867ga14cg61e1b57bbc00 | 14c92702-1829-49d7-a12f-5d6ce4dc07b5 | stub
                                              Now that's how you celebrate.
                                              h876767bagc00fg45f2gaf87gc55460752225 | 17321729-29af-4c4d-b7e6-4b7a005b4e17 | stub
                                              I might need a few more of those, before the sun threatens to rise.
                                              h9377aed3g9f61g4350gb699g902c292eb7b1 | 5a47be90-da01-417f-92d3-9001d300d9cc | stub

                            183.ShadowheartIllusion: You've been busy! Careful you don't pull a muscle - I'm not there to nurse you back to health any more.

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c327768-8373-6e97-1d78-fc2b7b2000e9Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h315bbab7g5310g47a0g8213g754eefed909dText UUID: 3c28e15a-4982-4b02-adad-26cb9791ef15Timeline Phase Index: 244Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2c327768-8373-6e97-1d78-fc2b7b2000e9Timeline Phase Duration: 8.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2451.77s-2459.01s] | @ 2452.05s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2451.77s-2459.01s] | @ 2454.21s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2451.77s-2459.01s] | @ 2456.65s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2459.01s-2460.58s] | @ 2459.25s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2459.01s-2460.58s] | @ 2459.97s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2459.01s-2460.58s] | @ 2460.06s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2459.01s-2460.58s] | @ 2460.11s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicry

                            665.ShadowheartIllusion: Ooh, you utter tease. I suppose I, of all people, can't begrudge you your secrets.

                          337.Player: I have been tempering myself in battle across the Astral Sea, weakening the lich queen's grip on the throne with every thrust of my blade.Full-IllithidEND_GameFinale_State_LaezelOrpheusPathLae'zel

                          • +
                            468.ShadowheartIllusion: No interest in a little respite then? I won't claim to be surprised - you never struck me as the sort to rest on her laurels, Lae'zel.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72c8f1fd-d084-af85-eaef-e320f504777aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4b6f1e72g52d1g4223gb4fcgae9f0855c7f6Text UUID: 2ece8c9c-a73b-4ab8-b690-8d43122be85bTimeline Phase Index: 338Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 72c8f1fd-d084-af85-eaef-e320f504777aTimeline Phase Duration: 10.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3493.08s-3503.25s] | @ 3493.62s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3493.08s-3503.25s] | @ 3497.29s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3493.08s-3503.25s] | @ 3499.78s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
                            • See Node 955 (ShadowheartIllusion) I suppose you'll be keen to do the rounds, with your time here being so short. Do not let me hoard your attention.
                        • +

                            114.ShadowheartIllusion: You would think Vlaakith would understand by now that it would take more than a few cutthroats to best you.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ada441c-a358-8de2-0951-ce9927dd1772Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: haf443b37g6d94g40b9ga219g7ba3bc90f0f7Text UUID: a5dd0a1c-3c90-4f58-80b5-11b8cf527374Timeline Phase Index: 221Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1ada441c-a358-8de2-0951-ce9927dd1772Timeline Phase Duration: 15.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2174.3s-2188.66s] | @ 2175.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2174.3s-2188.66s] | @ 2179.37s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2174.3s-2188.66s] | @ 2180.69s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2174.3s-2188.66s] | @ 2184.2s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2174.3s-2188.66s] | @ 2188.19s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2188.66s-2190.24s] | @ 2188.94s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2188.66s-2190.24s] | @ 2189.21s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [2188.66s-2190.24s] | @ 2189.4s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [2188.66s-2190.24s] | @ 2189.89s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: 1ada441c-a358-8de2-0951-ce9927dd1772Group Index: 0

                              159.ShadowheartIllusion: But no matter - I'm quite content to let her ranks of minions dwindle against the edge of your blade.

                            40.ShadowheartIllusion: Helping shape the minds of future generations, is it? Just be sure to steer them far away from dabbling in Netherese magic...

                            949.ShadowheartIllusion: Mmm, yes. Shy is indeed not a word I'd reach for, when it comes to her. I'm glad the city has you as a steadying influence - just don't solve all its problems, or I'll be short of new recruits.

                            Text

                            Mmm, yes. Shy is indeed not a word I'd reach for, when it comes to her. I'm glad the city has you as a steadying influence - just don't solve all its problems, or I'll be short of new recruits.
                            h583f5a13g9f12g4740ga30cg8b3f308fa9af | b00b383e-788c-44a6-a61f-bb9e916195ae | stub

                            804.ShadowheartIllusion: People never talk about just how exhausting power can be, do they? But I'm glad the city has you as a steadying influence - just don't solve all its problems, or I'll be short of new recruits.

                            Text

                            People never talk about just how exhausting power can be, do they? But I'm glad the city has you as a steadying influence - just don't solve all its problems, or I'll be short of new recruits.
                            hcd0b771fge3b2g47a8ga011g6cf94f06a0d4 | ebbd0bb4-cf63-4166-9e23-702c84f2f189 | stub

                            272.ShadowheartIllusion: And building up quite the reputation for yourself as well, no doubt? I've seen more than a few children playing as you on the streets, brandishing sticks at each other.

                            Metadata

                          h01f47ae9gce60g44b8g88a2ga6a770203523 | 69c72757-6e3f-4597-98b8-79bf5c3e676a | stub

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9b05f0c7-3ddf-fbbb-5e45-f699fba66f00Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: he6d6a3c1gf519g44abgacabga62bce890155Text 1 UUID: 69d69306-b213-46a8-a1c1-ecb7f86fed5aText 2 Handle: h01f47ae9gce60g44b8g88a2ga6a770203523Text 2 UUID: 69c72757-6e3f-4597-98b8-79bf5c3e676aShow Once: True
                          • See Node 272 (ShadowheartIllusion) And building up quite the reputation for yourself as well, no doubt? I've seen more than a few children playing as you on the streets, brandishing sticks at each other.

                            840.ShadowheartIllusion: It's good that you two have each other. Fitting perhaps; you left there a hunter and quarry, and return as allies and friends.

                            446.ShadowheartIllusion: And what better to revel in, than Lady Shar's umbral bliss? Just be careful to not overindulge - drain too many maidens and young bucks, and you may find a mob breaking down your door.

                            Text

                            And what better to revel in, than Lady Shar's umbral bliss? Just be careful to not overindulge - drain too many maidens and young bucks, and you may find a mob breaking down your door.
                            h7a704bebga87bg4a91g8ab5gbfdebbe1e7e2 | 0c05bfab-b68d-49b0-938b-daa8f9616359 | stub

                            512.ShadowheartIllusion: There's great virtue in stealth. Perhaps you can help train some of my initiates in the future. I can repay you in any juicy morsels who fail to pass muster.

                            508.ShadowheartIllusion: Not in the slightest, no. But I am glad to hear it, nonetheless.

                            Metadata

                            933.ShadowheartIllusion: Understandable. But rest assured that your secret is safe with me. Lady Shar respects those who live in the shadows.

            235.ShadowheartIllusion: In any case, I am glad you made it - tonight is not to be missed. Tonight is for celebrating.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3ba33a1b-b395-6cdc-e7a7-9e5ddfa1ae31Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h5a4c9f12gbfa3g4538gaa6agbfa721af728eText UUID: 34702f0d-491d-4e98-b8cb-1b9e6b01275cTimeline Phase Index: 231Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3ba33a1b-b395-6cdc-e7a7-9e5ddfa1ae31Timeline Phase Duration: 8.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2279.56s-2288.52s] | @ 2279.91s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2279.56s-2288.52s] | @ 2281.38s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2279.56s-2288.52s] | @ 2284.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2279.56s-2288.52s] | @ 2286.47s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2279.56s-2288.52s] | @ 2287.74s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

              473.ShadowheartIllusion: And at the risk of sounding boastful, I think we have plenty to celebrate; Lady Shar's entire church prospers. The Absolute washed the Sword Coast with blood and tears - it is now fertile ground for her message to flourish.

              Text

              And at the risk of sounding boastful, I think we have plenty to celebrate; Lady Shar's entire church prospers. The Absolute washed the Sword Coast with blood and tears - it is now fertile ground for her message to flourish.
              h0ab76107gfef7g45e0g9378gd3357b4acb18 | f5bb81b9-3ad4-4661-9ae2-a75f1bd8413b | stub

        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = True

        Text

        Variant 1

        combine=0
        • Full-Illithid
        A requirement of my title - if I'm to call myself Duke, I have to set an example and look suitably prosperous.
        hc98b1ae0g9980g49b7gba9dg5f62ab91a5a3 | 12888a14-3f35-4f8b-91a8-066d5cd5795c | stub

        Variant 2

        A requirement of my title - if I'm to call myself Duke, I have to set an example and look suitably prosperous.

        • +
          609.ShadowheartIllusion: Nobility suits you. I've been sure to keep some discreet eyes on your progress - their reports have been very complimentary.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 96429605-2bb7-9a07-7253-390996572e55Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h175357dcga523g4145g84c1ge84772dc065cText UUID: 409d5173-5375-415f-9250-98fda980fe00Timeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 96429605-2bb7-9a07-7253-390996572e55Timeline Phase Duration: 10.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [792.17s-802.25s] | @ 792.94s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [792.17s-802.25s] | @ 795.09s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [792.17s-802.25s] | @ 800.34s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [792.17s-802.25s] | @ 800.97s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [802.25s-811.27s] | @ 802.25s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23
          • See Node 235 (ShadowheartIllusion) In any case, I am glad you made it - tonight is not to be missed. Tonight is for celebrating.
      • +

          466.ShadowheartIllusion: So modest. You and I both know your visage is a mark of pride - it denotes fearlessness, tenacity, a capacity for self-sacrifice that would make most hearts quake.

          Metadata

    410.ShadowheartIllusion: Perhaps we should start throwing parties. But then again just attending them grants you all the fun with none of the mess...!ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParentsORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartEPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_HasmetEPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet2

    • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet2 {ef68426a-a31f-f521-535c-5af447777c10} = True

    Text

    Perhaps we should start throwing parties. But then again just attending them grants you all the fun with none of the mess...
    hcc66c107g07d7g40c3g8850g86ae49188c25 | f61b7b66-0e11-4bfe-b707-19d1e70b98a6 | stub
    Withers has surpassed himself with the musical accompaniment for the evening - I had feared things might be a touch more sedate, out here in the wilderness.
    hd13fd479gaaccg4e17gbc6fgc0c220b71cad | 74f33fc8-8ec4-4369-9539-c173758083dd | stub
    Can't keep away from me, I see? I don't blame you.
    ha4a59a55gbd18g4e71g881bgdd85a522bf3e | 4d131d2e-06ee-472f-82bd-444628e20913 | stub
    Checking in on me? Sweet of you.
    h19538bbcg8841g4659ga6b3g11dbf41b167b | c002c2ad-153b-4d10-a4cf-98daad0b320e | stub

                722.ShadowheartIllusion: Me neither. It's just like I dreamed of - a little house to call our own, teeming with animals, the flowers we sowed starting to bloom... and you there, at my side.

                Metadata

                377.ShadowheartIllusion: What's the current count again...? Four dogs, eight cats, nine chickens, six pigeons, four sheep, Daphne the milk cow, that odd little squirrel that keeps jumping on my shoulder, and Buttons, of course.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_Event_DaphneMentioned

                    241.ShadowheartIllusion: So am I, at times. But he's just a helpless pup. I don't think it was a coincidence when I found him out in the woods. Far from it.

                131.ShadowheartIllusion: True. I wonder if anyone will be interested to hear the stories they told me of my youngest years. It's still strange to think of this whole other childhood I had before Shar. Almost like it's some other little girl...

                Text

                True. I wonder if anyone will be interested to hear the stories they told me of my youngest years. It's still strange to think of this whole other childhood I had before Shar. Almost like it's some other little girl...

                          423.ShadowheartIllusion: But enough about Shar and her petty barbs - we're here to see old friends and enjoy ourselves, so let's do just that.

                          Metadata

                      • +
                        803.ShadowheartIllusion: Perhaps. I won't get my hopes up just yet, but in truth, it doesn't matter. Her plan failed - I'm happy. I mean, how could I not be? I have you.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c4d7e296-befc-04a6-630f-94450cac4563Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7bbb7871ge060g4383g8e7fg8193616fb2d0Text UUID: 94ba1d8c-b718-4687-bd34-d3d0ce1cb420Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c4d7e296-befc-04a6-630f-94450cac4563Timeline Phase Duration: 20.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1541.5s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1543.55s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1550.5s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1553.48s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1557.05s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1560.52s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1560.66s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1541.24s-1560.73s] | @ 1560.7s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicry

            80.ShadowheartIllusion: So, we should divvy up what we tell people about what we've been doing these past few months - I'd hate to be a bore that comes along and regurgitates the same story to someone moments after you've told them. Any ideas?

            Text

            So, we should divvy up what we tell people about what we've been doing these past few months - I'd hate to be a bore that comes along and regurgitates the same story to someone moments after you've told them. Any ideas?
            h86b79db1ge1ccg4bceg982fg8f1b9f8e6c94 | d70e9068-213a-4407-9bc8-e905b8bd0922 | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12351e7e-b7e6-5a2c-4cc6-2227af1912c7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h86b79db1ge1ccg4bceg982fg8f1b9f8e6c94Text UUID: d70e9068-213a-4407-9bc8-e905b8bd0922Timeline Phase Index: 280Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12351e7e-b7e6-5a2c-4cc6-2227af1912c7Timeline Phase Duration: 15.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2832.95s-2846.27s] | @ 2833.42s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2832.95s-2846.27s] | @ 2834.6s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2832.95s-2846.27s] | @ 2839s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2832.95s-2846.27s] | @ 2841.27s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2832.95s-2846.27s] | @ 2845.17s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

                88.ShadowheartIllusion: All about you, of course. 'Hells or not, every day's an adventure when I'm at Karlach's side', I'll tell them. KarlachWyllGaleAstarionLae'zel

                Flags and Tags

                ruletagtype rule
                • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}

                Text

                Variant 1

                combine=0
                • Karlach
                All about you, of course. 'Hells or not, every day's an adventure when I'm at Karlach's side', I'll tell them.
                h9ba7370eg9abdg4991gac28g2027bd083a2c | 2aafc096-7f34-4780-b759-0225f773c126 | stub

                Variant 2

                combine=0
                • Wyll
                All about you, of course. 'Every day's an adventure when I'm at my beloved Wyll's side', I'll tell them.
                h42770be2g4c8dg4eecgaeccg31e9519450d0 | 737d5ea1-accc-4f76-84ad-88ee03890810 | stub

                Variant 3

                combine=0
                • Gale
                All about you, of course. 'Every day's an adventure when I'm at my love Gale's side', I'll tell them.
                hd0b18532g3769g47b7gb1f1g1fc17e736c23 | 6246b871-4aa9-49a8-a140-2fc2cff307c8 | stub

                Variant 4

                combine=0
                • Astarion
                All about you, of course. 'Every day - or night - is an adventure when I'm at my paramour Astarion's side', I'll tell them.
                hc6eb69f8g0331g4bb0g83bfg929d1b695d0d | ac114fbb-b623-488d-b1c6-9c0919f72820 | stub

                Variant 5

                combine=0
                • Lae'zel
                All about you, of course. 'Every day is an adventure when I'm fighting at Lae'zel's side', I'll tell them.
                h3f1d94c0gedacg4630g9616g9c86d24b6db2 | 3288fe0d-028f-49f7-a87d-a42bf4df2969 | stub

                Variant 6

                Well, there's the visit to the House of the Moon, fending off Sharran assassins, that stray imp that joined us - Bing Bong, wasn't it? We've squeezed a lot - and I'm glad I got to share it all with you.
                hd3a3fc11g4908g4074gb9beg160a0ab4736a | 0abbc072-1407-4ca7-8477-460985f7d7c6 | stub

                Metadata

                Metadata

                791.ShadowheartIllusion: Hmm, that is a good one, though I wonder if they'll believe it - you and me against all those cambions? And I actually managed to land a hit with my sacred flame...?

                Metadata

                592.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course. You know, I think it was your self-confidence that made me fall for you to begin with - that, and that adorable earring of yours.

                Metadata

            215.ShadowheartIllusion: Anyway, I know it's real. I know we made it. I just wish I could go back in time and reassure the old me that it would all work out. But enough introspection - this is a party.

    874.ShadowheartIllusion: We should make this a tradition - meet up every year.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet3

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet3 {6327c37e-761e-bbd4-d09e-f1ed6b6a5da1} = True

    Text

    We should make this a tradition - meet up every year.
    h3a2ab1c8g8051g4b59g98e0g2c152cfe64c5 | e4178f8c-6c42-4052-916a-0b2f77716186 | stub
    My, you'll make the others jealous if you spend much more time with me.
    h91d97b4dg7410g4287gb0c7gae58527d789a | 2e446b4a-47f2-41aa-b8d2-cb19e24a2824 | stub
    I hope the sand takes its time slipping through the hourglass - I don't want tonight to end too soon.

    1008.ShadowheartIllusion: You know, I never really imagined Withers as much of a party-thrower, but then again I suppose our camps weren't taking care of themselves while we were out gallivanting, were they? There's hidden depths in that loveable husk.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet2EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet3

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet2 {ef68426a-a31f-f521-535c-5af447777c10} = True
    settype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_State_Hasmet3 {6327c37e-761e-bbd4-d09e-f1ed6b6a5da1} = True

    Text

    You know, I never really imagined Withers as much of a party-thrower, but then again I suppose our camps weren't taking care of themselves while we were out gallivanting, were they? There's hidden depths in that loveable husk.
    h1d42e3c0g8041g4a40g8cccg39919ebe1c87 | b4a1a73a-94d7-4231-8273-f2b2c372e937 | stub

            668.ShadowheartIllusion: You know, it'll be very difficult for me to keep focused on the rest of the party if you keep kissing me like that.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_Event_Kiss

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_Event_Kiss {d6e42b77-bb66-42de-868c-d0a6d7196d60} = True

            Text

            You know, it'll be very difficult for me to keep focused on the rest of the party if you keep kissing me like that.
            h8ef95803gfcfcg43bfgb5dcgb8c17001ed41 | 668b09f5-3084-47e9-9ae1-6ed9deb4cb3f | stub
            A shame I don't have my old tent - I might've been tempted to pull you into it.

            I hope there'll be more of those to come, before dawn creeps up on us.

          166.ShadowheartIllusion: Likewise. And I'm glad at least one of us was confident in your return - it hasn't always been easy, wondering if something might've happened to you and Karlach in that place...

          Text

            439.ShadowheartIllusion: ... but perhaps I should have known better than to doubt. It is you we're talking about, after all. Come here, will you?

            Metadata

                        356.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm glad you seem well. Truly.

                                798.ShadowheartIllusion: I found a little cottage; abandoned, half-ruined - there's a lot of such places to be found, thanks to the Absolute's armies. I've been making it my own.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3e312cf-09de-5705-fe26-76eefeb82556Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h244766f3g4e4dg4023gbd21g3e7b21d46c60Text UUID: 9251f19d-9dc7-4c3b-9bf5-ba76ca8f8f32Timeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3e312cf-09de-5705-fe26-76eefeb82556Timeline Phase Duration: 16.05sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1574.64s-1587.82s] | @ 1574.64s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1574.64s-1587.82s] | @ 1577.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1574.64s-1587.82s] | @ 1580.2s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1574.64s-1587.82s] | @ 1582.64s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1574.64s-1587.82s] | @ 1586.05s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
                                • +

                                    893.ShadowheartIllusion: Neither can I, but be warned - you'll need to be willing to share with the lodgers.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dffb8f2e-bf7b-d64d-fd09-bf24650e4efeSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7f4078aeg1aeeg4600gb515gb8058a264be8Text UUID: f51c4218-eb6e-4b5d-9133-7d619c2f7363Timeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dffb8f2e-bf7b-d64d-fd09-bf24650e4efeTimeline Phase Duration: 8.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0eTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0e.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1777.87s-1784.36s] | @ 1777.87s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1777.87s-1784.36s] | @ 1780.06s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1777.87s-1784.36s] | @ 1781.14s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1784.36s-1785.98s] | @ 1784.64s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1784.36s-1785.98s] | @ 1784.84s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1784.36s-1785.98s] | @ 1785.11s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1784.36s-1785.98s] | @ 1785.46s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicry

                                      57.ShadowheartIllusion: Four dogs, eight cats, nine chickens, six pigeons, four sheep, a milk cow named Daphne, a squirrel who's far too clever for her own good, and a wolf cub I found orphaned in some woods.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_Event_DaphneMentioned

                                      Flags and Tags

                                          255.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course, the cats have just been keeping your side of the bed warm for you. You may need to leave any dragon steeds behind when you return though - wouldn't want to tempt fate.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4179cf35-5dd0-47e2-d470-79fa006a4b5dSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: haae4f566g053dg49b5ga982g309a3a384e34Text UUID: 64e12b0c-1a63-4f0c-9599-25ccaef72751Timeline Phase Index: 297Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4179cf35-5dd0-47e2-d470-79fa006a4b5dTimeline Phase Duration: 14.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0eTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0e.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3023.96s-3029.94s] | @ 3023.96s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3023.96s-3029.94s] | @ 3025.49s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3023.96s-3029.94s] | @ 3026.71s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3023.96s-3029.94s] | @ 3029.17s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [3029.94s-3036.2s] | @ 3032.42s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [3029.94s-3036.2s] | @ 3034.32s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [3029.94s-3036.2s] | @ 3035.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

                                          919.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course, the cats have just been keeping your side of the bed warm for you. They may not be appreciative of the Hells-scent on you, but nothing a good scrub can't remedy.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e78fc385-9dfc-127e-0e5e-f0b0a89abbc7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hc72ede51gf2e3g47c5g8479g7e89468955b2Text UUID: 2ce94a0d-f6ae-4c24-b727-579ae8e9f67aTimeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e78fc385-9dfc-127e-0e5e-f0b0a89abbc7Timeline Phase Duration: 13.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Material 1 Group ID: f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0eTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0e.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1698.49s-1704.47s] | @ 1698.49s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1698.49s-1704.47s] | @ 1700.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1698.49s-1704.47s] | @ 1701.24s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1698.49s-1704.47s] | @ 1703.7s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1704.47s-1710.73s] | @ 1707.96s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1704.47s-1710.73s] | @ 1710.05s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

                                          234.ShadowheartIllusion: I've had to do far worse things with my hands, trust me. This is no burden at all. I don't think I've ever slept more soundly than I have with my menagerie of beasts for company.

                                          Metadata

                                          934.ShadowheartIllusion: He's just a frightened little pup - he has no idea what he'll grow up to be. And maybe with me there to guide him... who knows what he'll become? It's amazing what can happen, with the right nurturing.

                                          Text

                                          He's just a frightened little pup - he has no idea what he'll grow up to be. And maybe with me there to guide him... who knows what he'll become? It's amazing what can happen, with the right nurturing.

                                    30.ShadowheartIllusion: It's harder work than I'd expected, actually. I'll never take vegetables for granted after all the effort it's taken to grow a few, but still... it's mine. Well, mine and the lodgers.

                                    Text

                                    It's harder work than I'd expected, actually. I'll never take vegetables for granted after all the effort it's taken to grow a few, but still... it's mine. Well, mine and the lodgers.
                                    h036b2a03g60a5g48beg827cg070a5018ec6c | c3333231-4591-4007-90a4-e755ce59e94a | stub

                                    • See Node 57 (ShadowheartIllusion) Four dogs, eight cats, nine chickens, six pigeons, four sheep, a milk cow named Daphne, a squirrel who's far too clever for her own good, and a wolf cub I found orphaned in some woods.

                                    292.ShadowheartIllusion: You can come as soon as you please, so long as the lodgers approve of you.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49a05028-1c9f-2cfa-0a1a-a431c8e4e724Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h2cbb8240g97ffg4913gb141g895c8af3cab3Text UUID: d4ddc81b-35c7-45cf-8b8f-764266694aa2Timeline Phase Index: 354Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 49a05028-1c9f-2cfa-0a1a-a431c8e4e724Timeline Phase Duration: 5.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3691.69s-3696.06s] | @ 3691.91s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3691.69s-3696.06s] | @ 3693.47s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3691.69s-3696.06s] | @ 3694.59s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [3696.06s-3696.78s] | @ 3696.22s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [3696.06s-3696.78s] | @ 3696.34s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [3696.06s-3696.78s] | @ 3696.45s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | mimicry

                                    345.ShadowheartIllusion: I feel the same, honestly. The woman in the mirror looks unfamiliar sometimes - but she looks happy. And she has plenty of company as well.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5684a68a-3e31-e7ff-3722-02f7e653eb51Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h2b79c559g9836g4ebdg9a2cgad58bf8eaa20Text UUID: c4d32b4a-1c33-44fa-800b-026d0ae446c9Timeline Phase Index: 383Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5684a68a-3e31-e7ff-3722-02f7e653eb51Timeline Phase Duration: 15.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4063.57s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4064.5s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4066.44s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4068.93s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4072.53s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [4063.21s-4077.3s] | @ 4075.5s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [4077.3s-4078.34s] | @ 4077.56s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [4077.3s-4078.34s] | @ 4078.23s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [4078.34s-4078.45s] | @ 4078.39s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [4078.34s-4078.45s] | @ 4078.42s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicry

                                  • +
                                    759.ShadowheartIllusion: Healing. Learning to live again. It's hard to think of all that was robbed from them, but they're intent on making every day count for double.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b8f46895-1df6-9e54-f686-2a1fbc91d078Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h68fe4a8dga450g4a61ga040g112dea4ed3adText UUID:                                     • +
                                      523.ShadowheartIllusion: My mother's mind still drifts every now and again, but she has more good days than not-so-good days. She taught me her recipe for apple and plum pie, and when I tasted it, I actually remembered it, from when I was a little girl.

                                      Text

                                      My mother's mind still drifts every now and again, but she has more good days than not-so-good days. She taught me her recipe for apple and plum pie, and when I tasted it, I actually remembered it, from when I was a little girl.
                                      h4b021fddgd109g4de7g8a1dgd07e4d7f510c | 026d9ef0-0bc2-4633-b9bd-219d79d9c6aa | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 81523169-d5f0-d665-d050-99c15ff15ca7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4b021fddgd109g4de7g8a1dgd07e4d7f510cText UUID: 026d9ef0-0bc2-4633-b9bd-219d79d9c6aaGroup ID: b8f46895-1df6-9e54-f686-2a1fbc91d078Group Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        115.ShadowheartIllusion: Some things can't be taken from you, it seems.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b12f9db-9f00-a924-5c7f-03b4df412f17Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h603382ffg7721g4accgb229gff1227831139Text UUID: d5b282e5-4dd8-4443-9d75-1df15f2ef3e3Group ID: b8f46895-1df6-9e54-f686-2a1fbc91d078Group Index: 2
                                        • +
                                          654.ShadowheartIllusion: Father's making himself useful; helping me fix up the cottage, and caring for the animals. His wolf form is very useful in helping Buttons to acclimatise; I think part of him wishes I'd ended up a lycanthrope as well.fcae17a1-e2e8-e90b-ecc1-f6c62e97036e_ButttonsNamed

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Local
                                          • fcae17a1-e2e8-e90b-ecc1-f6c62e97036e_ButttonsNamed {5eec1194-dbee-3d60-dbdd-1bc5db721d23} = True

                                          Text

                                          Father's making himself useful; helping me fix up the cottage, and caring for the animals. His wolf form is very useful in helping Buttons to acclimatise; I think part of him wishes I'd ended up a lycanthrope as well.
                                          h0ad6fe2bgc78bg4bb4ga974g50d6e0bfde77 | 8ace846c-8adc-4dfe-9dd9-c1e8bc5ddd32 | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0e85368-747b-9ad3-bf87-0820d54f52ebSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h0ad6fe2bgc78bg4bb4ga974g50d6e0bfde77Text UUID: 8ace846c-8adc-4dfe-9dd9-c1e8bc5ddd32Timeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a0e85368-747b-9ad3-bf87-0820d54f52ebTimeline Phase Duration: 17.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [858.87s-876.06s] | @ 861.39s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [858.87s-876.06s] | @ 862.53s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [858.87s-876.06s] | @ 867.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [858.87s-876.06s] | @ 868.22s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [858.87s-876.06s] | @ 872.33s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [876.06s-877.39s] | @ 876.06s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [876.06s-877.39s] | @ 876.06s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)
                                          • +
                                            578.ShadowheartIllusion: And I've been telling them about you of course - how brave and selfless you were, going to the Hells with Karlach. And a lot more besides; you're my favourite topic.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedShadowheart

                                              98.Player: Not sharing anything too embarassing, I hope?

                                              • +
                                                705.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh no, of course not. I'll need you to be there in person that - see if I can make you squirm.

                                              595.Player: Sounds like they might have lofty expectations of me. I hope I'll live up to them.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 932a0b74-930e-0bb2-5cca-0f52645464aaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h32b90087gbe30g4bfbgaacdgeb1c086360d5Text UUID: bef90c4f-00d1-4df3-9823-9040d8a33094Show Once: True
                                              • +
                                                319.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't worry; you'll surpass them without even trying. They know everything you did. For Baldur's Gate. For me.

                                                Metadata

                                                897.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh of course, all that and more. But it's your modesty that I truly admire the most...

                                          • +
                                            283.ShadowheartIllusion: Sorry, I'm rambling. Family life and pastry recipes probably aren't the most interesting topics for such a historic reunion.

                                            Metadata

                                                  432.ShadowheartIllusion: As am I - and no small bit surprised, also. Part of me's afraid I'll wake from the dream and find myself back in the wilds, or worse, at the cloister. But no... it's real.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 68c0b864-3bf1-8892-6c02-f401260bf1f6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hc64ef27fgc4a7g4b3bga875g85aa7804986aText UUID: 2ad15cf7-7c13-403e-9fe2-7bfbf511de47Timeline Phase Index: 305Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 68c0b864-3bf1-8892-6c02-f401260bf1f6Timeline Phase Duration: 22.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3107.96s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3108.26s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3108.27s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3109.86s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3111.39s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3114.89s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3117.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3120.58s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3122.19s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3125.14s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [3107.66s-3128.71s] | @ 3127.37s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [3128.71s-3129.69s] | @ 3128.94s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)

                                          938.ShadowheartIllusion: Father's making himself useful; helping me fix up the cottage, and caring for the animals - you should see the amount I have now. He's been waiting years for this; now he can't stop smiling.

                                          Text

                                          Father's making himself useful; helping me fix up the cottage, and caring for the animals - you should see the amount I have now. He's been waiting years for this; now he can't stop smiling.
                                          he9b2dfdbg4553g4055gbbc9g56815e5c5ec6 | 1a3b8cec-fca5-4835-88e8-f0c72b74edf9 | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec261793-0774-fdcd-ceb6-9299e9b7437eSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: he9b2dfdbg4553g4055gbbc9g56815e5c5ec6Text UUID: 1a3b8cec-fca5-4835-88e8-f0c72b74edf9Timeline Phase Index: 187Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ec261793-0774-fdcd-ceb6-9299e9b7437eTimeline Phase Duration: 15.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1717.38s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1719.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1720.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1722.7s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1724.62s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1717.38s-1732.91s] | @ 1730.15s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1
                                          • See Node 578 (ShadowheartIllusion) And I've been telling them about you of course - how brave and selfless you were, going to the Hells with Karlach. And a lot more besides; you're my favourite topic.
                                          • See Node 551 (ShadowheartIllusion) And I've been telling them about you of course - how brave and selfless you were, joining Lae'zel. That, and a lot more besides; you're my favourite topic.
                                          • See Node 283 (ShadowheartIllusion) Sorry, I'm rambling. Family life and pastry recipes probably aren't the most interesting topics for such a historic reunion.
                                • +

                                    781.ShadowheartIllusion: The pain still comes from time to time, but I won't let her torment me. I won't let her take any more from me. She's had more than enough already - now she can dwell in her beloved darkness, ignored.

                                    Text

                                    The pain still comes from time to time, but I won't let her torment me. I won't let her take any more from me. She's had more than enough already - now she can dwell in her beloved darkness, ignored.
                                    hce4136d6g6bc0g4531g9b43g6cd0e5ed84f4 | 94a8f7f9-ad7f-4735-aa37-4f24e5053465 | stub

                                      848.ShadowheartIllusion: Sorry. I've found that happiness is an active thing. You have to fight for it every day, like you would a battle. I won't give her the satisfaction ever again.

                              • +
                                322.ShadowheartIllusion: Wandering, mostly. The adventuring life is almost a tonic when you're not constantly threatened by brain monsters and cultists. I can finally see the world beyond the Cloister.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 51e7288c-f256-bf35-9917-073b7cfb6889Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h0941a3f4g6ba7g493aga7fbg6ab1ecde4660Text UUID: 3b5b05fa-15f0-4cb7-a547-266a53a14fb8Timeline Phase Index: 368Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 51e7288c-f256-bf35-9917-073b7cfb6889Timeline Phase Duration: 14.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3871.7s-3884.96s] | @ 3871.7s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3871.7s-3884.96s] | @ 3874.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3871.7s-3884.96s] | @ 3879.02s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3871.7s-3884.96s] | @ 3881.4s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3871.7s-3884.96s] | @ 3883.82s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [3884.96s-3885.96s] | @ 3885.16s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [3884.96s-3885.96s] | @ 3885.54s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [3884.96s-3885.96s] | @ 3885.59s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [3884.96s-3885.96s] | @ 3885.68s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicry

                                  • +
                                    795.ShadowheartIllusion: Peace and quiet will still be there waiting once I've lived a little. Though don't get me wrong - I've got a little cottage with a garden and animals in mind already.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2ddd1a5-73b5-1dc8-5b33-3926ccbf8b6eSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h86c12f76gbf49g41abg86acg0f4e0e74d263Text UUID: c7e8461d-e80b-4dc8-9d93-5b45d12fbd04Timeline Phase Index: 152Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c2ddd1a5-73b5-1dc8-5b33-3926ccbf8b6eTimeline Phase Duration: 10.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1373.98s-1384.34s] | @ 1373.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1373.98s-1384.34s] | @ 1378.62s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1373.98s-1384.34s] | @ 1381.58s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2
                                    • +
                                      981.ShadowheartIllusion: One of my first stops was the House of the Moon, in Waterdeep. It's the largest temple of Selûne in existence.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f4885935-ea9a-f156-8b6a-1c5c030409d9Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h28b2fc73g87a7g457fga2e2g67906269818eText UUID: 0db43481-8702-451c-af62-ab788d959c27Timeline Phase Index: 331Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f4885935-ea9a-f156-8b6a-1c5c030409d9Timeline Phase Duration: 32.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3387.44s-3394.54s] | @ 3387.44s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3387.44s-3394.54s] | @ 3391.6s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [3394.54s-3396.46s] | @ 3394.86s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [3394.54s-3396.46s] | @ 3394.99s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [3394.54s-3396.46s] | @ 3395.1s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [3394.54s-3396.46s] | @ 3395.81s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [3394.54s-3396.46s] | @ 3396.25s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [3396.45s-3405.9s] | @ 3400.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [3396.45s-3405.9s] | @ 3402.86s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [3405.9s-3411.72s] | @ 3407.93s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 4 [3405.9s-3411.72s] | @ 3410.18s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 5 [3411.72s-3418.61s] | @ 3412.06s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [3411.72s-3418.61s] | @ 3415.28s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 6 [3418.61s-3419.61s] | @ 3418.77s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 6 [3418.61s-3419.61s] | @ 3419.42s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 16: Shot 6 [3418.61s-3419.61s] | @ 3419.49s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: f4885935-ea9a-f156-8b6a-1c5c030409d9Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        388.ShadowheartIllusion: It seemed like the perfect spot to reflect on my parents, on where they came from - and where I came from too, I suppose.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f0af4fa-1672-9bdc-4753-71a1c68f72e4Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hdde22615g2e8ag426bgbe0cgf21cf83fc547Text UUID: 53fb15a4-aca9-4ffe-b75b-e87aad4cd346Group ID: f4885935-ea9a-f156-8b6a-1c5c030409d9Group Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          564.ShadowheartIllusion: Hard to imagine, isn't it? Me, of all people, in the lair of the 'Moon Witch' herself. Gods, your truest act of heroism was putting up with all that Sharran drivel I was spouting for so long.

                                          Text

                                          Hard to imagine, isn't it? Me, of all people, in the lair of the 'Moon Witch' herself. Gods, your truest act of heroism was putting up with all that Sharran drivel I was spouting for so long.
                                          h6ab4b829g6851g4c0dg9e96ge1dde5039020 | af3145a0-6374-4b29-9d46-91f66ab33458 | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          • +
