                                              290.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh, I know they are. I can still sense them, I think. And one day, we'll be reunited.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 496b58c5-7745-75e0-4918-2cc3cef863beSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf590ba8cg355dg43a5gba23gc5eb90d20b8fText UUID: 0fe9d5c8-f740-41a9-b586-856392be4a6eTimeline Phase Index: 355Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 496b58c5-7745-75e0-4918-2cc3cef863beTimeline Phase Duration: 10.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3696.9s-3706.2s] | @ 3696.9s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3696.9s-3706.2s] | @ 3696.94s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3696.9s-3706.2s] | @ 3699.51s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3696.9s-3706.2s] | @ 3703.96s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3696.9s-3706.2s] | @ 3705.3s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [3706.2s-3707.2s] | @ 3706.32s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [3706.2s-3707.2s] | @ 3706.55s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [3706.2s-3707.2s] | @ 3706.8s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicry

                                                • +
                                                  736.ShadowheartIllusion: Well, I've had run-ins with my former fellow Sharrans on a couple of occasions. Word seems to have spread of what happened at the Cloister - now other chapters of Shar worshippers see me as a prime target to offer up to their lady as a sacrifice.

                                                  Text

                                                  Well, I've had run-ins with my former fellow Sharrans on a couple of occasions. Word seems to have spread of what happened at the Cloister - now other chapters of Shar worshippers see me as a prime target to offer up to their lady as a sacrifice.
                                                  hf2b4043fg86a3g4e43gb5cag0f3c1f95ef65 | c7c7c1ce-8baf-443a-9199-bfcd16791c4f | stub

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2acd483-9653-6b26-36d5-37c78914c0c2Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf2b4043fg86a3g4e43gb5cag0f3c1f95ef65Text UUID: c7c7c1ce-8baf-443a-9199-bfcd16791c4fTimeline Phase Index: 18Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b2acd483-9653-6b26-36d5-37c78914c0c2Timeline Phase Duration: 17.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [153.55s-169.9s] | @ 157.13s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [153.55s-169.9s] | @ 159.23s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [153.55s-169.9s] | @ 162.97s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [153.55s-169.9s] | @ 166.65s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [153.55s-169.9s] | @ 168.82s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [169.9s-170.9s] | @ 170.19s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [169.9s-170.9s] | @ 170.87s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicry
                                                  • +
                                                    435.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't worry. I know their tired old tricks better than anyone - they'll need more than a hooded cloak and poisoned blade to best me. Especially when I have a friend on the inside keeping me abreast of their predictable little plans.!LOW_ShadowheartFriend_State_DefeatedLOW_SharGrotto_State_UnlockedFriendDialog

                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                    checktype Global
                                                    • LOW_ShadowheartFriend_State_Defeated {cc356b4c-c53b-4326-8eb2-ae463b670acd} = False
                                                    • LOW_SharGrotto_State_UnlockedFriendDialog {dd67ca1e-b36d-49d1-8822-6bb47ebfe2fe} = True

                                                    Text

                                                    Don't worry. I know their tired old tricks better than anyone - they'll need more than a hooded cloak and poisoned blade to best me. Especially when I have a friend on the inside keeping me abreast of their predictable little plans.
                                                    h15d42904g6d5bg4f7egba66g6fb18c85a678 | b6f60790-5543-4ddb-8c21-ef46ee3ce508 | stub

                                                      • +
                                                        147.ShadowheartIllusion: None other. The matter of her faith and allegiances remains... complicated, let's say, but she is still my oldest friend.

                                                        Metadata

                                                          306.ShadowheartIllusion: I have hopes that perhaps she might turn from Shar entirely, given time, but that's a decision she will have to make for herself. If that day comes, I'll be ready.

                                                        794.ShadowheartIllusion: You saved the world - that doesn't leave much off the table. But point taken - I'll be as cautious as a cat with eight lives spent.

                                                    624.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't worry. I know their tired old tricks better than anyone - they'll need more than a hooded cloak and poisoned blade to best me.

                                                  442.ShadowheartIllusion: I don't know - which is just the way I like it just now. Perhaps I'll just stick a pin in a map and see what I find, or head to the docks in the morning and scrounge a berth to somewhere new.EPI_Epilogue_State_Shadowheart_ActivitiesShared

                                                  I don't know - which is just the way I like it just now. Perhaps I'll just stick a pin in a map and see what I find, or head to the docks in the morning and scrounge a berth to somewhere new.

                                                    843.ShadowheartIllusion: I'd like to see the islands maybe, or head south to Amn. I heard there's an enclave of werecats that hunt the followers of dark gods by moonlight. I'd love to see if there's any truth to that.

                                                    Text

                                                    I'd like to see the islands maybe, or head south to Amn. I heard there's an enclave of werecats that hunt the followers of dark gods by moonlight. I'd love to see if there's any truth to that.

                                              313.ShadowheartIllusion: Not quite. But luckily Selûne allows you to forge your own path. Perhaps I'll be drawn to her, perhaps not. Either way, I get to decide. That's not something I was ever able to claim before.

                                              Text

                                              Not quite. But luckily Selûne allows you to forge your own path. Perhaps I'll be drawn to her, perhaps not. Either way, I get to decide. That's not something I was ever able to claim before.
                                              hd233148dgc6a2g402fga359gd7580fc3fdd3 | d6d135c5-7624-451b-b752-c759f4137f4f | stub

                                            168.Player: You were in Waterdeep? A shame you didn't call in on Gale and I.ORI_Gale_State_ReturnedToWaterdeepORI_Gale_State_PlayerAgreedToWaterdeep!Gale

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            • +
                                              982.ShadowheartIllusion: I wanted to, truly, but I suspected someone with ill intent was tailing me. I didn't want to lead them to your door.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f4ed05f9-c799-9763-af4b-222a0379aff9Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h72ee2d4fgcc09g4cc9g9078gb2deae242d46Text UUID:                                               • +
                                                270.ShadowheartIllusion: I'd left the city by the time they made their move - don't worry, they proved no challenge. You might still spot crows pecking at Sharran bones on the road to Daggerford.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 444a07ff-8adc-30b3-98a4-e1296abc5a26Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h346de42fg4ca2g49d2g8ef9g4017c13cbe0bText UUID: 07719a29-5827-44c5-b01b-16f30ae5e3daGroup ID: f4ed05f9-c799-9763-af4b-222a0379aff9Group Index: 1
                                                • +
                                                  675.ShadowheartIllusion: Next time, I'll visit properly - and without any uninvited tagalongs. You both can give me the grand tour.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a61eb5e2-68e4-1241-82e3-4f4e99ba544fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h8c5d0d74g00dcg4e37gad6dga43172535be9Text UUID: 398ffba9-fd08-45f5-a17f-e8d0658c7b04Group ID: f4ed05f9-c799-9763-af4b-222a0379aff9Group Index: 2
                                                  • See Node 586 Jump to Node 290
                                          • +

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fea26bf9-eeac-7b74-ddf4-724460a061c2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h0f27a178g1fe3g4970gad74g40410604f552Text 1 UUID: d85e4779-edce-4d24-bc6f-bd9e1063655dText 2 Handle: h140dcb69g293eg4d57g9f19g24cfa8bde94aText 2 UUID: d6cf4b93-96fc-4c27-99fc-987ad28f5d76Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              393.ShadowheartIllusion: We had tea on his balcony - Tara even deigned to sit on my lap for a while. You know, I think entire forests must have been felled to quench that man's thirst for books.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6010eafb-1a94-05b5-508d-886815d11f7aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h377f26ddgd364g4657gb29ag6902986fc223Text UUID: fba14e59-b6c6-426e-a106-ce5d55664174Timeline Phase Index: 316Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6010eafb-1a94-05b5-508d-886815d11f7aTimeline Phase Duration: 17.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3259.36s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3261.47s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3263.1s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3265.75s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3269.96s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [3259.36s-3276.14s] | @ 3273.12s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [3276.14s-3277.14s] | @ 3276.33s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [3276.14s-3277.14s] | @ 3276.42s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [3276.14s-3277.14s] | @ 3276.43s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: 6010eafb-1a94-05b5-508d-886815d11f7aGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                880.ShadowheartIllusion: He seems to be doing well. In his element.

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 46134f4e-30a1-9e77-9a11-22605be955b2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h600a2d78gf45bg4e3egac90ga1982e8d2d8bText 1 UUID: 55cff7e1-15df-4e33-b14f-e8d4e2b7a096Text 2 Handle: h3ae6d02dg37fag434cg979bg2744491a03d4Text 2 UUID: d123aa3b-7ee4-4fe8-ada5-77369a51c13bShow Once: True
                                  • +
                                    1010.ShadowheartIllusion: I like to think so. Choosing my own path is still something of a novelty for me, but at least I'm free to make my own mistakes.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9ff2800-db14-15d4-cbf4-04fcbec1a3a7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h5eb961fegbd26g45f4g9560ge47998c1a874Text UUID: 71c24e7c-8116-4287-b220-90078ea32833Timeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f9ff2800-db14-15d4-cbf4-04fcbec1a3a7Timeline Phase Duration: 9.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1186.73s-1196.49s] | @ 1186.73s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1186.73s-1196.49s] | @ 1191.09s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2
                                    • See Node 981 (ShadowheartIllusion) One of my first stops was the House of the Moon, in Waterdeep. It's the largest temple of Selûne in existence.
                                • +

                                  • +
                                    474.ShadowheartIllusion: It's a privilege to have memories - even bad ones. They've moulded me into the person I am. As have you, come to think about it.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 75276c3c-a1aa-4989-f738-11685a320a9cSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h9b935a52g450fg4a14g8307g07b9ad4e25b1Text UUID: 8e96f7ad-2086-4423-850e-880bf8dd2eb6Timeline Phase Index: 344Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 75276c3c-a1aa-4989-f738-11685a320a9cTimeline Phase Duration: 22.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3557.34s-3563.3s] | @ 3557.34s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [3563.3s-3570.06s] | @ 3563.56s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [3563.3s-3570.06s] | @ 3566.42s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [3570.06s-3571.66s] | @ 3570.17s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [3570.06s-3571.66s] | @ 3570.67s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [3570.06s-3571.66s] | @ 3570.71s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [3570.06s-3571.66s] | @ 3571.06s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 4 [3571.66s-3579.65s] | @ 3572.12s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 4 [3571.66s-3579.65s] | @ 3576.69s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Group ID: 75276c3c-a1aa-4989-f738-11685a320a9cGroup Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      383.ShadowheartIllusion: I can't imagine what would have come of me, had we not crossed paths. Now I'm free to find myself.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5ea44b4e-3511-aaf0-1536-6eb8f4ef665aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: ha7309f85g3cdag4ed4g977dg80ff5a283e51Text UUID: c3a0d840-d256-41c5-8858-2e26e6afc96fGroup ID: 75276c3c-a1aa-4989-f738-11685a320a9cGroup Index: 1
                                      • •

                                846.ShadowheartIllusion: Raising hells with Karlach in Avernus, of course. I'm surprised you can't smell the brimstone on me.ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Karlach

                                  • +
                                    129.ShadowheartIllusion: But until then, I'm glad to be by her side - or thrown over her shoulder on occasion, if the odds turn against us.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1de44a1d-b73c-b663-b750-898e270a3205Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf5bb8daege68ag4b95gb36bg2f7461ddbdf1Text UUID: 5814042a-1585-4c02-a246-b2c32bfc4431Timeline Phase Index: 214Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1de44a1d-b73c-b663-b750-898e270a3205Timeline Phase Duration: 17.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2080.58s-2084.61s] | @ 2081.78s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [2084.61s-2089.97s] | @ 2084.9s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [2084.61s-2089.97s] | @ 2088.37s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2084.61s-2089.97s] | @ 2089.97s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [2089.97s-2096.61s] | @ 2091.86s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 4 [2096.61s-2097.61s] | @ 2096.8s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 4 [2096.61s-2097.61s] | @ 2096.95s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryGroup ID: 1de44a1d-b73c-b663-b750-898e270a3205Group Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      679.ShadowheartIllusion: Between you and me, I've pretended to have a sprained ankle now and again, for a ride on those muscles.

                                  703.ShadowheartIllusion: I wish I could see more of my parents, but we get by, and they're doing well for themselves. Perhaps one day both Karlach and I will be able to return for good.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents {8a0fad17-1615-4a0d-a045-21661d9a2aa0} = True

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac756dbd-764a-6c73-9264-410947ee3840Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hc5cc0b0ag56a0g43edg9af5gdb7abd2f12e4Text UUID: d75ee298-295f-4710-b8d8-87fba6004444Timeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac756dbd-764a-6c73-9264-410947ee3840Timeline Phase Duration: 10.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [287.11s-298.03s] | @ 287.11s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [287.11s-298.03s] | @ 289.51s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [287.11s-298.03s] | @ 294.09s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
                                  • See Node 129 (ShadowheartIllusion) But until then, I'm glad to be by her side - or thrown over her shoulder on occasion, if the odds turn against us.

                                  232.ShadowheartIllusion: ... sorry, am I oversharing? I don't get much practice at polite conversation in that place, as I'm sure you can imagine.

                                    602.ShadowheartIllusion: It's not exactly the quiet life, but perhaps after all that happened with my parents, it's for the best if I keep busy. Still though, I hope Wyll and I can return for good some day.

                                    Text

                                    It's not exactly the quiet life, but perhaps after all that happened with my parents, it's for the best if I keep busy. Still though, I hope Wyll and I can return for good some day.

                              • +
                                866.ShadowheartIllusion: At Wyll's side, of course. Honestly, I'm still not used to being married - it's almost a surprise, every morning that I wake next to him. But a very pleasant surprise.GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDuke!Wyll

                                    277.ShadowheartIllusion: Who knows? Perhaps they'll have grandchildren before long.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 46b40ab4-d4ba-11d5-048e-7dcc1df33630Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7a5a8a24gd159g4acag8e08ge118c911b003Text UUID: fb24cd02-5875-43f5-a9ca-1520cac9993eTimeline Phase Index: 360Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 46b40ab4-d4ba-11d5-048e-7dcc1df33630Timeline Phase Duration: 4.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0eTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\f64b7447-3c6d-4e59-bf61-6e9cd3c2dd0e.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3760.96s-3765.6s] | @ 3760.96s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3760.96s-3765.6s] | @ 3764.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2

                                • +
                                  463.ShadowheartIllusion: And I get to see my parents almost every day - I need to make every moment with them count, after so much was stolen from us. But they're doing well, and are very pleased to have a son-in-law.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents {8a0fad17-1615-4a0d-a045-21661d9a2aa0} = True

                                  Text

                                  And I get to see my parents almost every day - I need to make every moment with them count, after so much was stolen from us. But they're doing well, and are very pleased to have a son-in-law.
                                  h070702dbg57c6g466cg8069gf53e00891c9f | 9edce06d-eaa0-46bc-bd10-4401a7471886 | stub

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7104baa5-d8f8-0a58-f41d-c809f4b57eaeSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h070702dbg57c6g466cg8069gf53e00891c9fText UUID: 9edce06d-eaa0-46bc-bd10-4401a7471886Timeline Phase Index: 340Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7104baa5-d8f8-0a58-f41d-c809f4b57eaeTimeline Phase Duration: 13.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3518.74s-3532.7s] | @ 3519.56s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3518.74s-3532.7s] | @ 3522.83s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3518.74s-3532.7s] | @ 3526.23s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3518.74s-3532.7s] | @ 3528.2s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1
                                  • See Node 277 (ShadowheartIllusion) Who knows? Perhaps they'll have grandchildren before long.
                                • +
                                  828.ShadowheartIllusion: I only wish my parents could have met him properly... but I think they know I'm happy. I can feel their presence, when the moon is full.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb03fe0e-23d1-ae35-8641-7b5b413e4bafSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4912fb6cg050bg4a95gac45g70f8b5d88e41Text UUID: 3ab789f3-7086-4a60-a5ba-0ca684e0e8f6Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cb03fe0e-23d1-ae35-8641-7b5b413e4bafTimeline Phase Duration: 10.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1439.22s-1449.81s] | @ 1440.2s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1439.22s-1449.81s] | @ 1443.44s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1439.22s-1449.81s] | @ 1446.19s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

                              • +
                                702.ShadowheartIllusion: Fighting at Lae'zel's side. Vlaakith is clinging to power, but the tide is turning in our favour, battle by battle.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac568cbd-411f-e5d1-a18c-60e9a66a2a4aSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h247fc451g8390g4a63g9393g11602ee94e32Text UUID: 6733cc33-c581-4e0a-bf46-26ef3f48d3f3Timeline Phase Index: 248Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac568cbd-411f-e5d1-a18c-60e9a66a2a4aTimeline Phase Duration: 20.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2501.52s-2510.26s] | @ 2501.52s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2501.52s-2510.26s] | @ 2505.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2501.52s-2510.26s] | @ 2508.97s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2510.26s-2511.66s] | @ 2510.37s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2510.26s-2511.66s] | @ 2510.74s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2510.26s-2511.66s] | @ 2510.88s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2510.26s-2511.66s] | @ 2511.18s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [2511.66s-2522.41s] | @ 2511.86s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [2511.66s-2522.41s] | @ 2516.28s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [2511.66s-2522.41s] | @ 2519.17s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: ac568cbd-411f-e5d1-a18c-60e9a66a2a4aGroup Index: 0
                                • +
                                  100.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm not quite used to riding on a dragon with Lae'zel yet - I tend to cling to her waist for dear life. She makes the beast do barrel rolls every now and again to make me squeal.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 167b543e-9d8d-f39d-e0bd-fb9588e8dcd6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4b7c2286g8360g4812g9122g968f42b8dd85Text UUID: 63040174-3df9-47b1-b068-34f76f72504cGroup ID: ac568cbd-411f-e5d1-a18c-60e9a66a2a4aGroup Index: 1
                                  • +

                                    364.ShadowheartIllusion: I wish I could see more of my parents, but we manage to stay in touch. They're well, settled at a cottage I found for them. Perhaps one day Lae'zel will have her fill of battle, and we can go join them for good.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    checktype Global
                                    • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents {8a0fad17-1615-4a0d-a045-21661d9a2aa0} = True

                                    Text

                                    I wish I could see more of my parents, but we manage to stay in touch. They're well, settled at a cottage I found for them. Perhaps one day Lae'zel will have her fill of battle, and we can go join them for good.
                                    h043fe6bdg843ag4ff6g8348g824e09ad1f54 | 7b1111d4-5879-49b1-bccb-02654cf698d3 | stub

                                    980.ShadowheartIllusion: I wonder what my parents would make of it, if they could see me. I'd like to think they'd be glad I was happy.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f4477d29-ee30-5e63-fc61-a87cc7fea759Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h197af723gf8ccg4073g8b93g372ec1e393a2Text UUID: b50f18ff-28db-4da8-a36e-2e6f0a1bfd78Timeline Phase Index: 113Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f4477d29-ee30-5e63-fc61-a87cc7fea759Timeline Phase Duration: 7.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1059.34s-1067.33s] | @ 1059.34s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1059.34s-1067.33s] | @ 1062.74s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

                                60.ShadowheartIllusion: I've been at Astarion's side. You'll have to forgive me if you catch me yawning - this is the latest in a very long line of parties. He takes 'no rest for the wicked' very seriously.

                                Text

                                I've been at Astarion's side. You'll have to forgive me if you catch me yawning - this is the latest in a very long line of parties. He takes 'no rest for the wicked' very seriously.

                                  967.ShadowheartIllusion: My parents are close enough that I get to see them regularly - a little cottage, outside the city. I need to make every moment with them count, after so much was stolen from us. ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_SavedParents

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global

                                993.ShadowheartIllusion: I've been at Astarion's side. You'll have to forgive me if you catch me yawning - given his aversion to the sun, we've had to keep unsocial hours in order to make the best of each other's company.

                                Text

                                I've been at Astarion's side. You'll have to forgive me if you catch me yawning - given his aversion to the sun, we've had to keep unsocial hours in order to make the best of each other's company.

                                        805.ShadowheartIllusion: As am I - it's well-deserved, and I dare anyone to argue otherwise.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c51493c4-64fa-984d-c0f9-d28d55a184c6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h68ed22begb727g4f95g9575g8c68c9f084a4Text UUID: 21c13669-d26d-46a4-9126-53814e18153cTimeline Phase Index: 106Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c51493c4-64fa-984d-c0f9-d28d55a184c6Timeline Phase Duration: 7.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [990.39s-997.64s] | @ 990.43s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [990.39s-997.64s] | @ 991.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [990.39s-997.64s] | @ 993.91s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [990.39s-997.64s] | @ 995.4s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2
                                        • +
                                          52.ShadowheartIllusion: Hopefully these meet-ups will become a regular occurrence. It's not that I miss the tadpoles, but at least it brought us together. Now we've got to make the extra effort ourselves.

                                                248.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm sure we will, but let's be proactive about it, all the same. We're more than capable.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3fd6e136-ad96-3b56-0010-aad15b20cc98Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h10ed4ea4gcaadg46a6gbab0gf004b3bc8564Text UUID: 8e53c0d9-abab-4970-ac21-823514575d37Timeline Phase Index: 227Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3fd6e136-ad96-3b56-0010-aad15b20cc98Timeline Phase Duration: 7.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2233.32s-2240.52s] | @ 2233.32s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2233.32s-2240.52s] | @ 2235.08s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2233.32s-2240.52s] | @ 2236.54s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
                                                • •
                                                  67.ShadowheartIllusion: After all, we've faced down bigger threats than wrangling together a few social calendars.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0eb0ebd9-dc4f-bbbe-ec45-b6f23b3487ecSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h19232240g71b6g46c7g89afg82ea3c4f076dText UUID: f4558b24-417f-40a9-8d0d-fd876e5bbad2Timeline Phase Index: 287Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0eb0ebd9-dc4f-bbbe-ec45-b6f23b3487ecTimeline Phase Duration: 5.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2919.78s-2924.66s] | @ 2919.78s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2919.78s-2924.66s] | @ 2922.2s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [2924.66s-2925.16s] | @ 2924.8s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2924.66s-2925.16s] | @ 2924.96s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2924.66s-2925.16s] | @ 2925.02s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicry
                                            • +
                                              891.Player: Getting a group of friends to regularly agree to a time and place can prove...challenging.Full-Illithid!fcae17a1-e2e8-e90b-ecc1-f6c62e97036e_Local_KeepInTouchfcae17a1-e2e8-e90b-ecc1-f6c62e97036e_Local_KeepInTouch

                                              • +
                                                66.ShadowheartIllusion: Don't remind me - someone's always got somewhere else to be. But let's do our best, all the same.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0eacdbfa-8cc7-f755-80e7-a1ada78e76e6Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hbc95957eg40b2g4819g9261g178d575c06fdText UUID: 58aac112-8ef9-49fb-80b6-882ab8db397fTimeline Phase Index: 288Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0eacdbfa-8cc7-f755-80e7-a1ada78e76e6Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2925.16s-2933.16s] | @ 2925.16s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2925.16s-2933.16s] | @ 2925.63s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2925.16s-2933.16s] | @ 2928.12s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2925.16s-2933.16s] | @ 2930.4s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
                                                • See Node 67 (ShadowheartIllusion) After all, we've faced down bigger threats than wrangling together a few social calendars.

                                      831.Player: Boast of adventures you've embarked on since you parted ways with her.!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                      • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False

                                      • +
                                        374.ShadowheartIllusion: Do you ever rest? Think of all those poor budding adventurers looking to make a name for themselves - take some time off and give them a chance, why don't you?

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5c5868d0-05c1-2fb2-8a96-3ab592391010Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hab671eb8gd1f3g4e7bg9a03g045229fe7a19Text UUID: d5a7b9b5-9a1d-4caf-93bf-8e81e2364933Timeline Phase Index: 373Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5c5868d0-05c1-2fb2-8a96-3ab592391010Timeline Phase Duration: 10.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3952.84s-3963.77s] | @ 3952.84s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3952.84s-3963.77s] | @ 3955.31s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3952.84s-3963.77s] | @ 3957.49s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3952.84s-3963.77s] | @ 3959.71s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3952.84s-3963.77s] | @ 3961.63s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2
                                        • See Node 52 (ShadowheartIllusion) Hopefully these meet-ups will become a regular occurrence. It's not that I miss the tadpoles, but at least it brought us together. Now we've got to make the extra effort ourselves.
                                    • +

                                      • +
                                        713.ShadowheartIllusion: Playing it coy, are we? Sounds like a girl I used to know... but you're entitled to your secrets - at least until the festivities loosen your tongue a bit.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aebff73a-01d6-4ba6-d945-f7f1d88fe0f1Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4ef324efg9822g49c9gb38bg471ca189d698Text UUID: 7ef7776d-bf46-435c-826b-0f95d7e4b20fTimeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aebff73a-01d6-4ba6-d945-f7f1d88fe0f1Timeline Phase Duration: 12.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [249.89s-261.97s] | @ 249.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [249.89s-261.97s] | @ 252.08s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [249.89s-261.97s] | @ 257.93s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [249.89s-261.97s] | @ 260.82s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
                                        • See Node 52 (ShadowheartIllusion) Hopefully these meet-ups will become a regular occurrence. It's not that I miss the tadpoles, but at least it brought us together. Now we've got to make the extra effort ourselves.

                                        998.ShadowheartIllusion: A sorely-deserved downfall, I might add. Vlaakith made the wrong enemies, and now it will cost her everything.

                                        59.ShadowheartIllusion: She sowed the seeds of her own destruction when she betrayed you, Lae'zel. Just be careful. I wouldn't want anything to happen to you out there.

                                              • See Node 52 (ShadowheartIllusion) Hopefully these meet-ups will become a regular occurrence. It's not that I miss the tadpoles, but at least it brought us together. Now we've got to make the extra effort ourselves.
                                        • +
                                          1013.Player: Perhaps. You could be my apprentice - carry my shield, clean my boots, lay out my bedroll...
                                          Full-Illithid

                                          • +
                                            398.ShadowheartIllusion: Ahem, if we journey together, it would be as equals. I think we've both been through enough to have earned each other's respect by now.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6134f641-a683-5827-2ef2-32eed3195461Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hef02ff09g4a17g48b4ga186g5bd66c85424dText UUID: 5ac8ef4f-6cba-4567-9711-e9f63a0bf2f5Timeline Phase Index: 315Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6134f641-a683-5827-2ef2-32eed3195461Timeline Phase Duration: 11.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3248.14s-3259.36s] | @ 3248.14s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3248.14s-3259.36s] | @ 3248.28s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3248.14s-3259.36s] | @ 3253.92s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3248.14s-3259.36s] | @ 3257.74s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1
                                            • See Node 19 (ShadowheartIllusion) Think it over. We can talk more in the morning; pore over some maps perhaps.
                                        • +

                                            693.ShadowheartIllusion: That's the beauty of it - we're in no hurry. We can do what we like now. Besides, you'll need someone to patch you up from time to time.

                                        75.ShadowheartIllusion: Glad to hear it. After all we've been through, I think you deserve some time where the greatest peril you'll face is a papercut.

                                        476.ShadowheartIllusion: I should gift you some ear-plugs the next time I see you then. But I know you'll be able to keep Mizora in her place.

                                        53.ShadowheartIllusion: There are few I'd trust to wield such powers more than you. I expect a new generation will grow up listening to tales of the Blade - Hells, give it a few more months and there'll probably be a host of newborns called Wyll.

                                        Text

                                        There are few I'd trust to wield such powers more than you. I expect a new generation will grow up listening to tales of the Blade - Hells, give it a few more months and there'll probably be a host of newborns called Wyll.

                                        898.ShadowheartIllusion: You doing your best is already far more than most. I expect a new generation will grow up listening to tales of the Blade - Hells, give it a few more months and there'll probably be a host of newborns called Wyll.

                                        Text

                                        You doing your best is already far more than most. I expect a new generation will grow up listening to tales of the Blade - Hells, give it a few more months and there'll probably be a host of newborns called Wyll.

                                      • +
                                        901.ShadowheartIllusion: Death, exile, or ceremorphosis. I'm sorry, Karlach. I wished there'd been better options open to you... but who knows? Perhaps they'll reveal themselves in time.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2e5192f-6172-1068-07fe-a2dac2332ca7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h0a1d0d4eg7c59g4fb4g89a3gae8ed12829ebText UUID: b4a41b4d-14c4-4de7-901f-3608922f1392Timeline Phase Index: 212Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e2e5192f-6172-1068-07fe-a2dac2332ca7Timeline Phase Duration: 20.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2041.12s-2053.12s] | @ 2046.36s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2041.12s-2053.12s] | @ 2051.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [2053.12s-2062.09s] | @ 2053.8s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2053.12s-2062.09s] | @ 2060.03s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2062.09s-2080.58s] | @ 2062.09s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Group ID: e2e5192f-6172-1068-07fe-a2dac2332ca7Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          134.ShadowheartIllusion: And we'll still have tonight. That's got to count for something.

                                      • +
                                        844.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh, I don't know - I manage, in my own way. Selûne offers her wisdom of course, but she has a far lighter touch than Shar ever did.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d050b386-303a-0751-3831-d4373ddc9006Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4b643c16g1d08g4d03gbc76g270d9a63fb92Text UUID: e0d6584b-64b2-423f-bb29-f3d6bb7f8ab6Timeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d050b386-303a-0751-3831-d4373ddc9006Timeline Phase Duration: 16.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1408.71s-1413.76s] | @ 1408.71s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1408.71s-1413.76s] | @ 1412.65s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1413.76s-1419.3s] | @ 1417.67s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [1419.3s-1425.13s] | @ 1419.48s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [1419.3s-1425.13s] | @ 1421.35s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [1419.3s-1425.13s] | @ 1423.32s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Group ID: d050b386-303a-0751-3831-d4373ddc9006Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          935.ShadowheartIllusion: You're more than capable of forging your own path. I'm certain of it.

                                        806.ShadowheartIllusion: I can imagine - a celebrity in their midst? They must have raised their voices from whispers to faint murmurs.

                                      730.Player: My new form has dictated that I live a quiet existence, far from prying eyes and panicky hearts.Full-Illithid

                                      • +
                                        339.ShadowheartIllusion: Well you needn't count me amongst the panicky - I know what you did for all of us, and I'll never forget it.

                                      46.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course I'll have him - if he wants to come with me, that is. I'd have offered sooner, but everything was a blur after the battle - I thought he'd gone to roam free...

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 095979c2-a49d-debc-9c47-eb64c775bc2cSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h8aba6a7cgd48dg4224ga5b2ga052d76a7c30Text UUID: 8b75f8ea-7b17-4b73-88d4-44b0c76c0687Timeline Phase Index: 259Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 095979c2-a49d-debc-9c47-eb64c775bc2cTimeline Phase Duration: 11.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2614.32s-2624.17s] | @ 2616.43s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2614.32s-2624.17s] | @ 2619.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2614.32s-2624.17s] | @ 2620.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2614.32s-2624.17s] | @ 2623.45s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2624.17s-2625.67s] | @ 2624.25s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2624.17s-2625.67s] | @ 2624.5s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2624.17s-2625.67s] | @ 2624.57s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [2624.17s-2625.67s] | @ 2625.23s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicry
                                      • +
                                        279.ShadowheartIllusion: I'll have to find somewhere for him to sleep, of course - he'd get stuck in the door of my cottage. Maybe the barn? It's as warm as anywhere, as long as he gets along with Daphne.EPI_Epilogue_Shadowheart_Event_DaphneMentioned

                                        744.ShadowheartIllusion: I'll have to find somewhere for him to sleep, of course - he'd get stuck in the door of my cottage. Maybe the barn? It's as warm as anywhere, as long as he gets along with the other animals.

                                  810.ShadowheartIllusion: They don't - they just wing it.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c5ce404d-bf20-d45f-5c00-19f29ead3d91Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h561a6741gce92g4d00g8b00g2b963fc52d0bText UUID: 3a718770-9de9-433b-9b44-f3fb0c320974Group ID: 5d4fb810-7e87-5535-5763-fd8aee629de4Group Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    743.ShadowheartIllusion: Sorry. My father's got years of terrible jokes stocked up that he never got to tell me when I was younger, but lucky for him, I never heard them... and seemingly I am easily amused.

                                    Text

                                    Sorry. My father's got years of terrible jokes stocked up that he never got to tell me when I was younger, but lucky for him, I never heard them... and seemingly I am easily amused.
                                    h81da7239gc77fg4a67ga8c9gd58129a5963b | 64e0f683-8d55-4415-a7ae-ced9861cd71e | stub

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b48b95f8-d8ce-5cb4-5783-d02ee151c267Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h81da7239gc77fg4a67ga8c9gd58129a5963bText UUID: 64e0f683-8d55-4415-a7ae-ced9861cd71eGroup ID: 5d4fb810-7e87-5535-5763-fd8aee629de4Group Index: 2
                                    • +
                                      296.Player: That joke was as funny as night orchids are poisonous.Full-IllithidORI_Shadowheart_Event_GiveNightOrchid

                              958.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh don't be such a grumpy rothé - being sentimental is what parties are for. Give it some time - you'll loosen up as the night progresses.

                    297.Player: You can say that again. I've slept under the stars enough for one lifetime.Full-IllithidKarlach

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

                      643.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm not entirely sure I'd agree - in fact, I found a nice meadow not far from where I live now. Every now and again, I'll spend the night there. For old time's sake.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e196457-3afd-0f0e-08e8-6a71b0178b91Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h337d9549gb3ddg462bg88b8gf3a24093a774Text UUID: 1095607c-9b9f-456b-9ce1-63b63f54e506Timeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9e196457-3afd-0f0e-08e8-6a71b0178b91Timeline Phase Duration: 15.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [914.59s-928.8s] | @ 914.92s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [914.59s-928.8s] | @ 917.93s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [914.59s-928.8s] | @ 920.38s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [914.59s-928.8s] | @ 923.8s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [914.59s-928.8s] | @ 926.13s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [928.8s-930.13s] | @ 928.92s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [928.8s-930.13s] | @ 929.32s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [928.8s-930.13s] | @ 929.85s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [928.8s-930.13s] | @ 929.89s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | mimicry

          948.ShadowheartIllusion: He's quite powerful for a fellow content to loiter in our camp the whole time, isn't he? I wonder if he'll ever reveal what he's been up to, exactly...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eebc8aa9-01f4-32ab-ef71-347fed39f916Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hbdbe06acg8dc2g4813g9475g08c91d4419c4Text UUID: 92557036-db66-4c44-8d1e-5140a01b7fddTimeline Phase Index: 80Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eebc8aa9-01f4-32ab-ef71-347fed39f916Timeline Phase Duration: 17.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 769.03s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 769.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 772.17s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 775.31s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 779.39s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 781.88s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [768.47s-785.8s] | @ 784.91s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Group ID: eebc8aa9-01f4-32ab-ef71-347fed39f916Group Index: 0

        428.Player: Didn't know Withers could snag me at will. Wish he'd do it more often.ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellKarlach

        Flags and Tags

        • See Node 948 (ShadowheartIllusion) He's quite powerful for a fellow content to loiter in our camp the whole time, isn't he? I wonder if he'll ever reveal what he's been up to, exactly...
      • +
